use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

// GOOD: explicit fields, deny unknown fields
#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
#[serde(deny_unknown_fields)]
struct UserConfig {
    name: String,
    email: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    timezone: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    locale: String,
}

#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
#[serde(deny_unknown_fields)]
struct ApiRequest {
    action: String,
    #[serde(default)]
    timeout_ms: Option<u64>,
    #[serde(default)]
    retry_count: Option<u32>,
}

#[derive(Deserialize, Serialize)]
#[serde(tag = "event_type")]
enum Event {
    #[serde(rename = "user_created")]
    UserCreated { user_id: String, timestamp: u64 },
    #[serde(rename = "order_placed")]
    OrderPlaced { order_id: String, amount: f64 },
}
